---
title: "Lesson 1: Introduction to the Introduction"
author: "Nicky Wakim"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-color: "#3070BF"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: "../simple_NW.scss"
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    width: 1955
    height: 1100
    footer: Lesson 01 Slides
    html-math-method: mathjax
    highlight-style: arrow
execute:
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

## Some good skills to know

- Copying code: the copy option on all code!
